content:
Hi, I just cleared chapter 7 and still don't know exactly what I'm doing in terms of wheels and covenant. Can anyone give me some recommendations (and explanations with it so I can learn please)?

Resources to work with:
- 114 non-limited pulls
- 89 limited pulls (preferably saving for more characters I want when their banners come up)
- Zero rose scrip
- 633 sediment, 31.8k badges, 6.5k lightless, 23.2k d-jewel
- The wheels shown and not much of note for covenant
thread_title: Seeking covenant + wheel advice for Helot/Thais/Mouchette/Faint build
